recipes.title: Summer Saison
recipes.description:
A bright, spicy summer saison with a dry finish. Perfect for sharing at a warm afternoon brew day.

This recipe was entirely written by AI in the process of designing this website. If anyone tries it out, we would be genuinely curious how it turns out.

recipes.title: Paul's Silver Pils
recipes.description:
Winner of silver medal in lager category at Beerfest 2016.

Ferment at 10°C for 12 days, then increase by 4°C per day up to 18°C, 18°C 2 days then decrease by 4° per day until 2° is reached. Lager @ 2°C for 3 weeks
